SHARE PURCHASE AGREEMENT

This SHARE PURCHASE AGREEMENT ("Agreement") is made and entered into on this 1st day of October, 2023, by and between:

1. Dr. Emily Tan, NRIC No. S7234567B, residing at 123 Fictional Road, Singapore 098765, and reachable at +65 9123 4567, email: emilytan@syntheticmail.sg ("Seller").

2. Quantum Innovations Pte. Ltd., a company incorporated in Singapore with UEN 202312345H, having its registered office at 456 Imaginary Avenue, Singapore 123456 ("Purchaser").

RECITALS

WHEREAS, the Seller owns 100,000 shares in the capital of Quantum Solutions Ltd., valued at SGD 500,000 (five hundred thousand Singapore dollars);

WHEREAS, the Purchaser desires to purchase, and the Seller desires to sell, all of the shares on the terms and conditions set forth herein.
